reviews.comment:
Tomamos un café riquísimo. El cafetero muy amable.
Los baños impecables.
Inflamos las cubiertas y funciona perfecto.
Me lleve una buena impresión de la estación.

(Translated by Google)
We had a delicious coffee. The barista was very friendly.
The restrooms were spotless.
We inflated our tires and it worked perfectly.
I was very impressed with the station.
